label.coffee.coffee_name: Stellar Collisions Next Generation - Peach Co-ferment Blend
label.coffee.sensory_text: We Taste: Peaches, Brown Sugar, Peach Sweet Tea; Every cup delivers a joyful burst of peachy sweetness with surprising complexity and .
label.coffee.display_tasting_notes: Peaches, Brown Sugar, Peach Sweet Tea
label.coffee.producer_text: Stellar Collisions The Next Generation is made up of the following coffees: PEACH — Sebastian Ramirez; Farm Name: Fincas El Placer; Location: Quindío, Colombia; Elevation: 1744 masl; Variety: Caturra; Process: Black Honey / Co-Fermented; RECRUITMENT LOT — Community Lot Recruitment; Andes, Antioquia, Colombia; 1800-2000 masl; Castillo, Caturra & Colombia; Washed; Currently taking place in Andes, Antioquia, The program aims to identify and attract young coffee producers interested in turning their farms into successful businesses in the specialty coffee market. The program establishes quality parameters and taste profiles, holds joint cuppings, and collaborates with Cabresto to reach more people in the region. By evaluating the quality and taste of each coffee lot, the team hopes to identify potential candidates for the program and provide support through the Young Producer Association (YPA) in town. This lot is the result of that identification process, and we're delighted to share it with you.
